answer:
We are given external dimensions: 3.3 m × 2.6 m × 1.3 m, with walls 5 cm thick.  
The internal volume must be 8000 liters = 8 m³.  
Let bottom thickness be \( t \) m. Internal length = 3.3 - 2×0.05 = 3.2 m, internal width = 2.6 - 2×0.05 = 2.5 m, internal height = 1.3 - (0.05 + t).  
Volume: \( 3.2 \times 2.5 \times (1.25 - t) = 8 \).  
So \( 8 \times (1.25 - t) = 8 \) → \( 1.25 - t = 1 \) → \( t = 0.25 \) m = 25 cm = 2.5 dm.  
None of the given options match
